achievements.title: Nice Work, Heisenberg - But It Won't Save You
achievements.description: Create an infinite supply of 420 for yourself and promptly be blocked out of the rest of the achievements
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Calm the Hell Down, Kid!
achievements.description: [Claire] Get shot at by some punk teenager called Steve
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: That's All You Get of Leon, Sorry
achievements.description: [Claire] Contact Leon to warn Chris... then watch Steve throw a tantrum...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Ahead of Their Time
achievements.description: [Claire] Unlock the way forward with some impressive 3D printing
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Princess in Shining Armor
achievements.description: [Claire] Save Steve from the Luger Trap as fast as you can
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: You Reap What You Sow, Kid
achievements.description: [Claire] Take your time saving Steve... let the brat suffer for being an ungrateful thief
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Young Nobleman of Madness
achievements.description: [Claire] Meet Alfred Ashford, commander of this base
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Welcome to the Ashford Wonderland
achievements.description: [Claire] Encounter and exterminate one of Rockfort Island's more "unique" horrors
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Alas, Poor Brat...
achievements.description: [Claire] Learn that Steve is in fact a really troubled kid
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Wicked Twins
achievements.description: [Claire] Listen in on Alfred talking with his oddly elusive sister
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Close Eye on Things
achievements.description: [Claire] Use a literal eye to open a secret path
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Our Fates Are Forever Intertwined
achievements.description: [Claire] Have a surprise encounter with Wesker and listen to how much he despises Chris
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Proof of Your Endurance
achievements.description: [Claire] Collect the Army, Navy, and Air Force proofs
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Split Down the Middle
achievements.description: [Claire] Discover the truth behind Alfred and Alexia
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Get Off Our Plane!
achievements.description: [Claire] Catapult the Tyrant out of the cargo hold
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Scream I'll Never Forget
achievements.description: [Claire] Encounter a very disturbing prisoner inside the Antarctic Base
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Sins of the Children
achievements.description: [Claire] Finally take out Alfred... right as his prisoner gets freed...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: At Last, Alexander Can Rest...
achievements.description: [Claire] Kill Nosferatu
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Gulped Up
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Gulp Worm for good
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Awakening
achievements.description: [Chris] Discover Alexia has awakened at the same time Wesker finds out... as Wesker also finds out you're here too...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Driven by Pure Hatred
achievements.description: [Chris] Confront your old S.T.A.R.S. captain and witness the power he's gained
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Secret Rooms, Typical of Umbrella...
achievements.description: [Chris] Reveal the hidden staircase in the Diorama Room
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Shock to Your System
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Albinoid Adult
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Just a Bit Longer, Claire...
achievements.description: [Chris] Find a plane to escape Rockfort Island's remains and continue the search for your sister
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Wicked Queen
achievements.description: [Chris] Unearth two of Alexia's horrors as she finally meets you face-to-face... assuming you haven't already met her...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Call Me Arachnophobic
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Giant Spider
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: You Woke Him Up Too Early!
achievements.description: [Chris] Have your only meeting with Alfred and take his ring as a keepsake
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Redfield Siblings Unite!
achievements.description: [Chris] Finally save your sister who's safe and sound... aside from being covered in goo...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: ...With Assembly Required
achievements.description: [Chris] Find that Claire has been poisoned and give her the serum she needs to heal
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Alas, Poor Lover Boy...
achievements.description: [Claire] Find that Steve wasn't just a creep and really did love you
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: She's Probably Not Dead...
achievements.description: [Chris] Fight off Alexia after Wesker leaves you to deal with her
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Sister's Tears
achievements.description: [Chris] Get what you need from Claire to finally get the hell out of here
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: It's on the Box Art, Dummy!
achievements.description: [Chris] Enter the code you need to end this
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Queen's Reign Ends
achievements.description: [Chris] Finally destroy Alexia and the Ashford legacy... and also try to settle the score with Wesker...
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Not This Again!
achievements.description: [Claire] When the truck explodes, escape the zombies in the Graveyard without taking damage, turning back to the prison cell, or trying to fight them
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Raccoon City Taught Me a Thing or Two
achievements.description: [Claire] Kill every zombie during the Graveyard Ambush without running away
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: And Jill Said It Was Tough...
achievements.description: [Claire] Defeat the Gulp Worm in the Exercise Yard
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: You're Right, Alfred - This WAS Fun!
achievements.description: [Claire] Kill the first Bandersnatch without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Girl's Wisdom
achievements.description: [Steve] Go back to Claire and get some words of encouragement
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Kid in King Arthur's Court
achievements.description: [Steve] Kill every zombie before reaching the elevator
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Paying It Forward
achievements.description: [Claire] Return to Rodrigo with Hemostatic Medicine
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Nothing Gets Out Except Me!
achievements.description: [Claire] Kill the Albinoid Infants in the Biohazard Containment Room and escape
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Don't You Dare Leave Without Me!
achievements.description: [Claire] Reach the airplane with at least 2:30 remaining on the timer
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Never Trust Anything with "BOW" on It...
achievements.description: [Claire] Defeat the Tyrant on the plane without using the BOW Gas Rounds
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Not My First Go-Around, Big Guy
achievements.description: [Claire] Defeat the Tyrant on the plane without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: One Hell of an Immune System
achievements.description: [Claire] From the start of Disc 2, escape the Antarctic Base in one session without getting poisoned
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Straight to the Heart
achievements.description: [Claire] Execute Nosferatu using Alfred's Sniper Rifle
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: That Cut Deep...
achievements.description: [Claire] Execute Nosferatu by sticking a Knife right into his heart
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: You're No Count Orlok
achievements.description: [Claire] Kill Nosferatu without taking damage and without using the Sniper Rifle (must NOT have Sniper Rifle equipped when starting the fight)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Just a Worm That's Worm Food
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Gulp Worm without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: I Remember You Bastards Really Well
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Hunters that ambush you in the Turn Table room without taking damage or running away
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Metal Gear Redfield
achievements.description: [Chris] Starting from the Hunter Ambush in the Turn Table Room, escape Rockfort Island in one session without getting caught by any of Wesker's Spotters
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Ooh, Purple. So Scary...
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Sweeper that ambushes you in the Chemical Storage Room without taking damage or running away
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: It Just Wants to Swim in Peace...
achievements.description: [Chris] Grab the Eagle Plate from the Water Pool and escape the Albinoid Adult without killing it or taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: I Hate to Break the Ice, But...
achievements.description: [Chris] Escape the zombies in the frozen Machine Room without taking damage or trying to attack them
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Black Tiger Was Scarier
achievements.description: [Chris] Kill the Giant Spider without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Not Letting It Touch Me!
achievements.description: [Chris] When the Giant Spider breaks free, grab Alexander's Pierce and escape the room without taking damage, running away, or trying to attack it
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: My Gun Is Immune to Your Charms
achievements.description: [Chris] Defeat Alexia's first form without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: 9 Seconds - That's All *I* Can Spare to Play
achievements.description: [Chris] Defeat Alexia's first form within 9 seconds
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Very Nasty Queen, Indeed...
achievements.description: [Chris] Defeat Alexia's 2nd and 3rd forms without taking damage
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Guns Akimbo!
achievements.description: [Claire] Collect the M-100P pistols
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Better than the Dixon One
achievements.description: [Claire] Collect the Bow Gun
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Some Extra Kaboom
achievements.description: [Claire] Collect the Grenade Launcher
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Straight from the Gurlukovich Armory
achievements.description: Collect the Assault Rifle
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Real Knight in Shining Armor
achievements.description: [Chris] Obtain your own set of Submachine Guns as a gift for saving Rodrigo... take that, Steve!
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Such an Elaborate Process to Find It...
achievements.description: [Chris] Obtain the Magnum
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Like a Lil' Uzi
achievements.description: Modify your M93R to support burst fire
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Glocked Up
achievements.description: [Chris] Modify your Glock 17 into the Enhanced Handgun
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: ASPCA Will Have Umbrella's Head...
achievements.description: Kill every Zombie Dog in the main game
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Back Into the Looking Glass
achievements.description: Kill every Bandersnatch in the main game (Enemies that respawn MUST be re-killed)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: RABIES! RABIES!!!
achievements.description: Kill every Bat in the main game (Enemies that respawn MUST be re-killed)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Black Widow? They're Not Even the Right Color...
achievements.description: Kill every Spider in the main game
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Fear Them Once Again
achievements.description: Kill every Hunter in the main game (Enemies that respawn MUST be re-killed)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Lethal Toxicity
achievements.description: Kill every Sweeper in the main game (Enemies that respawn MUST be re-killed)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Legacy of the Ashford Family
achievements.description: Collect every file and map in the main game (does not include Battle Game exclusive D.I.J.'s Diary)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Is for Ashford
achievements.description: Complete the game with an A Rank and practically secure yourself as royalty
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: We Could Easily Run a Marathon Against Wesker
achievements.description: Complete the game in under 2 hours and 45 minutes
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: No Need for the Extra Weight
achievements.description: Complete the game without picking up either Side Pack
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Forgotten by History
achievements.description: Complete the game in one session without saving or retrying (first half save is allowed, but cannot be loaded)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Using Them Felt Like a Headache, Anyway...
achievements.description: Complete the game in one session without using an Item Box
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Real Survival Horror Is Cruel
achievements.description: Complete the game in one session with an A rank and picking up only the guns you are forced to pick up (Sniper Rifle allowed)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Raccoon City Prepped Me for This
achievements.description: [Claire] Complete the Battle Game in Third Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Dressed to Impress
achievements.description: [Claire Alt] Complete the Battle Game in Third Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: S.T.A.R.S. Lives On
achievements.description: [Chris] Complete the Battle Game in Third Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Not Just a Dumb Kid
achievements.description: [Steve] Complete the Battle Game in Third Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Sure, I'm Not Human Anymore...
achievements.description: [Wesker] Complete the Battle Game in Third Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Through the Eyes of a Redfield
achievements.description: [Claire] Complete the Battle Game in First Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: You Like What You See?
achievements.description: [Claire Alt] Complete the Battle Game in First Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Up Close and Personal
achievements.description: [Chris] Complete the Battle Game in First Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Eyes of a Perv
achievements.description: [Steve] Complete the Battle Game in First Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: ...Just Look At the Power I've Gained
achievements.description: [Wesker] Complete the Battle Game in First Person mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Still Made in Heaven
achievements.description: [Claire] Complete the Battle Game with an A Rank in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: *Really* Made in Heaven
achievements.description: [Claire Alt] Complete the Battle Game with an A Rank in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: The Man Who Survived the Mansion Incident
achievements.description: [Chris] Complete the Battle Game with an A Rank in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Finally, an Actual Knight
achievements.description: [Steve] Complete the Battle Game with an A Rank in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Worthy of Being a God
achievements.description: [Wesker] Complete the Battle Game with an A Rank in 15 minutes or less in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: My Trusty Sidekick
achievements.description: [Claire] Complete the Battle Game using only the Handgun in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Putting the "AK" in Ass-Kicking
achievements.description: [Claire Alt] Complete the Battle Game using only the Assault Rifle in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Professional Head-Popper
achievements.description: [Chris] Complete the Battle Game using only the Shotgun in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Your One Chance to Feel Golden
achievements.description: [Steve] Complete the Battle Game using only the Gold Lugers in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Ripping Them All Apart by Hand
achievements.description: [Wesker] Complete the Battle Game using only the Knife in either mode
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: I... Feel Cheated...
achievements.description: [Battle Game] Obtain D.I.J.'s Diary as any character
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: It's Just Like Dante Says!
achievements.description: [Battle Game] Obtain an item that's actually useful from the Slot Machine as any character
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: It's Super Overpowered Here, You'll Be Fine
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 25 enemies with the Combat Knife in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Every Shot's Betta with a Beretta
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 25 enemies with the Standard or Custom M93R Handgun in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Austrian Aim Assistance
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 20 enemies with the Standard or Modified Glock 17 in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Double the Guns, Double the Fun
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 15 enemies with the M-100P Pistols in one session without unequipping them (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: I Ain't Gonna Tell 'Em Twice
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 25 enemies with Regular or Explosive Arrows from the Bow Gun in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: An Old-Fashioned Game of "Toss the Pineapple"
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 30 enemies with any rounds from the Grenade Launcher in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Name Not Be Deceiving, I'm Far from Subpar
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 15 enemies with the Sub-Machine Guns in one session without unequipping them (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Assaulting in Every Sense of the Word
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 20 enemies with the Assault Rifle in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Clean Sweep of the Boomstick
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 25 enemies with the Shotgun in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: Can't Wait to Fire It Off
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 10 enemies with the Magnum in one session without unequipping it (excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: CODE Veronica Is... Out to Launch
achievements.description: [Main Game] Kill 50 enemies with the Rocket Launcher in one session (unequipping is allowed, excludes bug enemies and bosses, resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980

achievements.title: A Thin Line Between Life & Death
achievements.description: [Battle Game] Kill 70 enemies with the Linear Launcher in one session without unequipping it (resets upon death or returning to Main Menu)
achievements.author: shnick1980
